title: Infinite Wind Charge
description: This Data Pack Makes Wind Charge's Have Infinite Uses
body:
- This Data Pack Makes It When You Give A Wind Charge Infinity It Will Have Infinite Use

**This is for the Original version of this data pack you don't have to do this anymore. To Get A Wind Charge With Infinity Just Put A Infinity Book In Your Offhand And A Wind Charge In Your Mainhand, that's it man. :)**

**for original version of this data pack functions:
infinite_windcharge:give**
